no: Installed (1 components). Added from WeiDU.log scan. Makes ‘the mighty’ Tiax - the CE Gnome Thief/Cleric - recruitable in BG2 from his normal BG2 location.Install Tiax for BG2 before Mazzy Megamod and Detective’s Guild of Athkatla.

conflicts.reason: NOT a conflict — managed coexistence. BG1NPCSoA cn:50 auto-detects Tiax NPC via FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME O#Tiax.cre and skips its own Tiax, installing only Quayle. Both mods coexist cleanly. Keep both — no action needed.
conflicts.theirComps: #50 Gnomes in the City: Quayle & Tiax
conflicts.source: BG1NPCSoA.tp2 line 9513: REQUIRE_PREDICATE with OR; line 9540: ACTION_IF NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME O#Tiax.cre, 2026-03

sum: An NPC mod for Baldur's Gate II (BGII, BGT, BGII:EE, EET)!

co.n: Tiax NPC MOD for Baldur's Gate II
co.tp2n: Tiax NPC MOD for Baldur's Gate II
